steps.name: I enter username "locked_out_user" and password "secret_sauce" using Playwright
I click the login button using Playwright
I should see an error message "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out." using Playwright

arguments.val: "Epic sadface: Sorry, this user has been locked out."

name: Login Functionality with Playwright
description:
As a user
  I want to be able to log into the application using Playwright
  So that I can access my account
